title: Database connection timeouts spiking in reporting service
body:
Automated alerting triggered at 08:44 UTC. The reporting-service is throwing intermittent connection timeouts on reads from the analytics-db replica. Error rate on GET /reports/* has climbed to 18% over the last 12 minutes. Affected endpoints: /reports/daily, /reports/export, /reports/dashboard. Stack trace from sampled requests:

java.sql.SQLTimeoutException: Timeout waiting for connection from pool
  at com.bts.reporting.ReportingService.fetchReportData(ReportingService.java:89)
  at com.bts.reporting.ReportController.getReport(ReportController.java:44)

Replica lag is currently 47 seconds (normal is <2s). Primary appears healthy. No deploys in the last 6 hours. Three enterprise customers (Initech, Globex Corp, Umbrella Ltd) have already raised support tickets.
